items.title: Citi Lifts Caterpillar (CAT) Target as Construction and Mining Outlook Improves
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the 15 Best Blue-Chip Stocks with Growing Dividends. On December 11, Citi raised its price target for Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) to $690 from $670 and kept a Buy rating on the stock. The firm updated its machinery group models as part of its 2026 outlook. Citi sees the most […]

items.title: Santa Rally Looms: These 5 Stocks Often Deliver Gifts To Investors
items.description: The Santa Claus rally has a long track record. See how often the S&P 500 rises late in December — and which stocks have led the move.

items.title: Is Caterpillar (CAT) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Caterpillar (CAT) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
